sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: EX-99.1
feed.summary: Prothena announced that Novo Nordisk will advance coramitug (formerly PRX004), a potential first-in-class amyloid depleter antibody, into Phase 3 development for ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy. Novo Nordisk successfully completed a Phase 2 trial and expects to initiate the Phase 3 program in 2025. Prothena is eligible to receive a clinical milestone payment upon meeting prespecified enrollment criteria in the Phase 3 trial, as part of an agreement that could total up to $1.2 billion in milestones.

feed.title: Eurex, Cboe end 2025 with record credit futures OI despite December volume pullback
feed.summary: Eurex and Cboe concluded 2025 with record open interest (OI) in credit futures, despite a December dip in trading volumes. CME's dollar credit futures saw significant growth in average daily volume (ADV) and OI for the year, with newer duration-hedged products performing well. Eurex dominated euro credit future positioning, also achieving rising OI, while Cboe maintained the largest overall stock of OI and consistently higher volumes.

feed.title: Scorpio Tankers stock rating downgraded by BofA on peak rate concerns
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded Scorpio Tankers (NYSE:STNG) from Buy to Underperform, lowering its price target to $53.00 from $67.00, citing concerns that product tanker rates may be nearing their peak. Despite the downgrade, the stock had an impressive 13% return in the last week. The revised price target is based on a reduced multiple of estimated 2026 EBITDA, and BofA also noted potential downward pressure on rates from a possible Russia-Ukraine peace agreement.

feed.title: Sigma Lithium stock rating downgraded to Underperform by BofA
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded Sigma Lithium Corp. (NASDAQ:SGML) from Neutral to Underperform, despite raising its price target to $13.00, which aligns with InvestingPro’s Fair Value. The downgrade is attributed to unresolved operational and liquidity issues at the lithium producer, even though the stock has seen a significant rally. These issues include a lack of clarity on when mining operations will resume and cash from prepayments will be received, which BofA believes could impact the company's balance sheet and future development timelines.

feed.title: Trevi Therapeutics (TRVI) Receives Reiterated 'Buy' Rating from HC Wainwright & Co. | TRVI Stock News
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. has reiterated its 'Buy' rating for Trevi Therapeutics (TRVI), maintaining a price target of $21.00, signaling confidence in the company's future growth. This follows a series of positive analyst ratings from various firms in late 2025, which also raised price targets. Trevi Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, is focused on developing Haduvio for chronic cough indications and prurigo nodularis.

feed.title: Vertex Pharma stock: Quiet chart, loud pipeline as Wall Street leans bullish
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) stock has been trading in a tight range recently, but analysts are bullish due to its strong pipeline in cystic fibrosis and gene editing. The company's one-year performance shows significant gains, and its strategic focus on high-value indications, coupled with a strong balance sheet, positions it well for future growth despite market consolidation. Wall Street largely maintains Buy ratings with price targets above the current levels, indicating confidence in Vertex's long-term potential.

feed.title: Global manufacturing PMI data hint at shifting global growth trajectories in 2026
feed.summary: Global manufacturing PMI data for 2025 showed dynamic regional performances, with ASEAN factories leading in output growth while the eurozone lagged. However, forward-looking sentiment for 2026 indicates a reversal, with eurozone producers exhibiting the most optimism, contrasting with pessimism in North America and parts of Asia. India recorded the largest output gain in 2025, but Thailand enters 2026 with the strongest optimism.

feed.title: PLDT eyes broader rollout of AI across key sectors
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. is expanding its artificial intelligence (AI) initiatives across the Philippines to promote inclusive digital growth. The company is leveraging its AI-ready infrastructure, including integrated networks and the VITRO Santa Rosa hyperscale data center, to facilitate AI adoption in various sectors. PLDT's efforts also involve its corporate arm developing AI use cases for industries like banking and healthcare, while its wireless unit Smart Communications is bringing AI solutions to MSMEs, government agencies, and educational institutions.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Has $19.39 Million Stake in The Clorox Company $CLX

feed.title: Molson Coors will lay out its 2026 outlook in February webcast
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company (TAP) announced it will release its 2025 fourth-quarter and full-year earnings results on February 18, 2026. On the same day, the company will participate in the 2026 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference, where CEO Rahul Goyal and CFO Tracey Joubert will discuss business strategies and the 2026 medium-term financial outlook. Due to this comprehensive presentation, Molson Coors will not host a separate quarterly earnings conference call.

feed.title: Athira Pharma Announces Name Change to LeonaBio, Inc. with New Ticker “LONA”
feed.summary: Athira Pharma has officially changed its name to LeonaBio, Inc. and will trade under the new ticker symbol "LONA" starting January 12, 2026. This rebranding follows the company's acquisition of rights to lasofoxifene, a Phase 3 program for metastatic breast cancer, and reflects its expanded mission to develop innovative, late-stage assets. LeonaBio will continue to advance its lead drug candidates, lasofoxifene for breast cancer and ATH-1105 for ALS, with significant financing secured to fund operations into 2028.

feed.title: The top investment banks by broad business in 2026. A brief guide from Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analysts have released a guide outlining the top investment banks in 2026 across various business areas, based on historic and estimated revenue figures. The analysis, which excludes Morgan Stanley itself, identifies JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Citi, and Bank of America as leading in total revenues. It also highlights specific leaders in IBD, equities, and FICC, while noting potential growth trends and challenges for European banks and the equities sales and trading sector.

feed.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Adobe and Salesforce
feed.summary: The article highlights Adobe (ADBE) and Salesforce (CRM) as two beaten-down tech stocks poised for a rebound in 2026 after underperforming in 2025. Both companies are seeing strong demand for their AI-driven offerings and reported positive quarterly results, with Adobe showing double-digit sales growth and Salesforce raising its sales outlook. The report suggests these stocks warrant observation in the new year for potential "comeback" stories.

feed.title: Seadrill stock price target raised to $40 from $33 at BTIG on dayrate resilience
feed.summary: BTIG has raised its price target for Seadrill Ltd. (NYSE:SDRL) to $40 from $33, maintaining a Buy rating due to resilient dayrates in the offshore drilling market. Despite a slight decrease in floater activity and working floater count, utilization rates remain strong, nearing levels where leading edge dayrates exceeded $500,000. Seadrill's recent contract wins, including the Mykonos drillship contract, underscore its financial health and operational strength.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty coming to Mountain Home
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty is set to open a new store in Mountain Home, a move local leaders anticipate will significantly boost the local economy by retaining shopping dollars within the community. This arrival follows nearly four years of consideration by the retailer and builds on recent retail growth in the area. The store will be located at 40 Plaza Way 60, though the opening date is yet to be announced.

feed.title: Hinge Health stock initiated with Overweight rating by Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on Hinge Health Inc (NYSE:HNGE) with an Overweight rating and a price target of $68.00, suggesting a 38% upside. The firm highlighted Hinge Health's leadership in the musculoskeletal (MSK) category, strong win rates, and robust gross profit margins. Analysts anticipate profitability this year and maintain a Buy recommendation, citing the company's expanding market position and strategic moves like a recent share repurchase plan.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) Upgraded by Wolfe Research to "Strong-Buy" Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has upgraded Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade follows multiple price target increases by other firms, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus from MarketBeat. The company recently surpassed Q2 earnings expectations and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance, while maintaining high institutional ownership despite some insider selling.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines stock: turbulence, opportunity, or classic value trap?
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines is currently experiencing investor uncertainty due to operational challenges, cost pressures, and aircraft delivery delays, leading its stock to trade near its 52-week low. While some analysts see a potential value opportunity, the predominant view on Wall Street is cautious, labeling it a "show me" stock. The airline's future performance hinges on effective management of aircraft deliveries, capacity adjustment, pricing strategies, and reputation rebuilding efforts.

feed.title: ROSEBURG TRACTOR SUPPLY SET TO OPEN IN MARCH
feed.summary: The new Tractor Supply store in Roseburg is scheduled for a soft opening on March 21st and a grand opening on March 28th. Located in North Roseburg Plaza, the store will offer various farm, pet, and outdoor lifestyle products. It is expected to create about fifteen new jobs for the area.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Stock Holdings Lifted by Park Avenue Securities LLC
feed.summary: Park Avenue Securities LLC increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 11.1% during the Q3, holding 50,107 shares valued at $5.74 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, with 65.71% of Disney's stock owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with recent reports highlighting positive sentiment around Disney+ short-form videos, "Zootopia 2" success, and "Tangled" live-action casting, alongside some neutral and negative sentiments like lawsuit allegations and Hulu consolidation uncertainty.

feed.title: Mizuho raises Valero Energy stock price target to $197 on crude differentials
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) to $197 from $192, maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock, citing wider crude differentials as a primary driver. The firm anticipates Valero will surpass Q4 2025 consensus estimates for earnings per share and cash flow from operations, partly due to increased crude availability in the Gulf Coast benefiting complex refiners. Despite some analyst downgrades reflecting concerns about the refining outlook, UBS reiterated its Buy rating, highlighting strong performance and strategic positioning.

feed.title: KLP Kapitalforvaltning AS Has $17.96 Million Holdings in Deckers Outdoor Corporation $DECK
feed.summary: KLP Kapitalforvaltning AS significantly increased its stake in Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE:DECK) by 21.0% in Q3, now holding 177,200 shares valued at approximately $17.96 million. feed.title: Is Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Still Fairly Priced After Strong Five Year Run
feed.summary: This article analyzes Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) to determine if its stock is fairly priced following a strong five-year performance. Using excess returns analysis and price-to-earnings ratios, the article suggests that BK is currently "about right" in its valuation. It also encourages investors to use the Simply Wall St platform to create personalized narratives and valuation models based on various internal and external factors.

feed.title: Why ARS Pharmaceuticals (SPRY) Is Down 6.0% After Winning China Approval For Neffy Allergy Spray
feed.summary: ARS Pharmaceuticals (SPRY) saw its stock drop 6.0% despite obtaining approval from China's National Medical Products Administration for its Neffy 2 mg epinephrine nasal spray for severe allergic reactions. This approval opens a large market in China, with a pediatric filing planned for further expansion, following a similar approval in Japan in 2025. The company's investment narrative heavily relies on Neffy's global expansion, managing its single-product dependence, and navigating potential pricing and reimbursement challenges in new markets.
